LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-11-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAGA, LANI $4,888.14 PRINCIPAL, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $365.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,853.14, SEE SCANNED DOC
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-20-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Robert Cohen of Law Office of Robert F. Cohen telephone number 800-492-2657 for Plaintiff.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed in open Court.
